login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register a new user
register.name: Name (optional)
register.success: Account created successfully. Sign in with your credentials.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and operation mode

mode.title: Operation mode
mode.changeWarning: Changing the mode will permanently delete all movements and conciliations.
mode.confirmBody: Changing the mode will permanently delete all movements and conciliations recorded so far. For security and compliance reasons, data processed under one mode cannot be carried over to the other. This action is irreversible.

modeSelect.title: How should ReconBanker operate?
modeSelect.subtitle: Choose the operation mode. You can change it later from Settings.
modeSelect.welcome: Welcome! Start by creating a bank account.

reconcile.title: Reconciliation
reconcile.desc: The system polls pending orders from your endpoint, matches them against bank movements, and fires the webhook on reconciliation.

passthrough.title: Direct notification
passthrough.desc: The system does not poll orders. Each detected bank movement triggers a direct webhook with the movement data.
